title: OpenStax Introduction to Sociology 3e
description: A source card for the OpenStax Introduction to Sociology 3e textbook.

pages.text: OpenStax Introduction to Sociology 3e covers culture, groups, socialization, inequality, institutions, population, social movements, and research methods.
Use this source for structured background before students analyze social data, community issues, institutions, or identity-focused nonfiction.
OpenStax books carry Creative Commons licenses. Check the linked book page for the exact license before mirroring chapters or figures.
